title: AI Model Query Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Model Query Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='0' y='0' width='400' height='300' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='25' y='35' font-size='24' font-family='Arial' fill='#C06C88'>Query Playground</text><text x='25' y='55' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#C06C88'>Select Model Type:</text><line x1='20' y1='75' x2='380' y2='75'/><circle cx='220' cy='75' r='10' fill='#411C56'/><text x='230' y='80' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#C06C88'>AI Model 1</text><text x='320' y='80' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#C06C88'>AI Model 2</text><text x='25' y='105' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#C06C88'>Input Parameters:</text><line x1='20' y='135' x2='380' y2='135'/><circle cx='220' cy='135' r='10' fill='#411C56'/><rect x='230' y='140' width='100' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='235' y='155' font-size='16' font-family='Arial' fill='#C06C88'>Param 1</text><text x='335' y='155' font-size='16' font-family='Arial' fill='#C06C88'>Param 2</text><text x='25' y='175' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#C06C88'>Visualize Results:</text><line x1='20' y='205' x2='380' y2='205'/><rect x='230' y='210' width='100' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='335' y='210' width='100' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='25' y='230' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#C06C88'>Sort by:</text><line x1='20' y='260' x2='380' y2='260'/><circle cx='220' cy='260' r='10' fill='#411C56'/><circle cx='320' cy='260' r='10' fill='#411C56'/></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must handle multiple query filters and sorting options
Must display analytical tables with real-time updates

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Model Query Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate the number and functionality of query filters (e.g., model selection, input parameter filtering).
Verify that the analytical tables are sorted and updated in real-time based on user interactions.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
